CerebroArtifact.description: The whole canonical artifact — the contract every layer agrees on.
CerebroArtifact.title: CerebroArtifact

CerebroDiff.description: Per-section structural diff between two canonical artifacts.
CerebroDiff.title: CerebroDiff

DataProfile.description: Statistical summary of the training table.
DataProfile.title: DataProfile

DecisionPath.description: Traced path through a single tree for one sample.
DecisionPath.title: DecisionPath

DecisionStep.description: One split node on the path from root to leaf.
DecisionStep.title: DecisionStep

Explanations.description: Full explanations bundle stored in the artifact.
Explanations.title: Explanations

FeatureDiagnostics.description: Diagnostics derived entirely from the canonical artifact.
FeatureDiagnostics.title: FeatureDiagnostics

FeatureSchema.description:
The features the model sees, in input order.

`monotone_constraints` has the same length as `names`. A value of 0 means
no monotonicity is enforced; +1 / -1 enforce increasing / decreasing
relationships between the feature and the prediction.
FeatureSchema.title: FeatureSchema

Importance.description: Feature importance scores keyed by feature name.
Importance.title: Importance

Model.description:
Booster-level metadata: objective, parameters, feature shape.

`params` is typed as `dict[str, Any]` because LightGBM stores a mix of
scalars, lists, and nested dicts; tightening this would require enumerating
every LightGBM parameter and would still need updates when LightGBM adds
parameters. The booster contract is what enforces shape — the extractor
forwards what LightGBM gives us.
Model.title: Model

ModelDetail.description: Detail page data — full version history, newest first.
ModelDetail.title: ModelDetail

ModelSummary.description: Card data for the registry home view.
ModelSummary.title: ModelSummary

PDPFeature.description: Partial dependence profile for one feature.
PDPFeature.title: PDPFeature

ShapResult.description:
SHAP values for a set of samples.

`shap_values` has shape (n_samples, n_features) for binary and regression
models. For multiclass it has shape (n_samples, n_classes, n_features),
stored as a nested list.
`expected_value` is a scalar for binary/regression; a list of per-class
base values for multiclass.
ShapResult.title: ShapResult

Source.description: Where this artifact came from and when.
Source.title: Source

Tree.description:
One tree in the ensemble.

`class_index` is null for binary boosters; per-class trees in multiclass
boosters set it to the class they predict (a future schema bump).
Tree.title: Tree

TreeNode.description: One node in a decision tree (recursive).
TreeNode.title: TreeNode

info.description: Model introspection platform — canonical artifact API. Every response cites the schema version it conforms to.
info.title: Cerebro

get.description: List registered artifacts, optionally filtered by tag.

Return the data profile section for `artifact_id`.

Returns column distributions, missingness rates, and pairwise Pearson
correlations from the training table. When no training table was provided
at extraction time, returns HTTP 200 with a detail message.

schema.title: Response Get Data Profile Artifacts  Artifact Id  Data Profile Get

get.description: Compute or retrieve feature diagnostics for an artifact.

parameters.description: Write diagnostics back to the artifact file.
parameters.name: persist

schema.description: Write diagnostics back to the artifact file.
schema.title: Persist

get.description:
Return a structured diff between two artifacts.

artifact_id is the base; compare_id is the target.

patch.description:
Add a data profile section to an existing artifact.

SHAP and evaluation enrichment require re-ingesting the model file via
POST /artifacts/ingest — the API layer cannot import LightGBM (invariant #2).

get.description:
Return the evaluation section for `artifact_id`.

Returns objective-aware evaluation metrics (ROC/confusion matrix for
binary, NxN confusion + per-class metrics for multiclass, residuals
for regression, nDCG@k for ranking). When evaluation was not computed,
returns HTTP 200 with a detail message.

schema.title: Response Get Evaluation Artifacts  Artifact Id  Evaluation Get

get.description:
Return the explanations section for `artifact_id`.

Returns the SHAP values, decision paths, and partial dependence profiles
stored at extraction time. When explanations were not computed, returns
HTTP 200 with a detail message (not 404 — the artifact exists).

schema.title: Response Get Explanations Artifacts  Artifact Id  Explanations Get

get.description:
Return importance scores for the requested type.

- gain / split: always available (computed at extraction time).
- permutation: available only when evaluation samples were provided
  at extraction time; returns HTTP 200 with empty features list and a
  detail message when absent.

parameters.description: Importance type: gain, split, or permutation
parameters.name: type

schema.description: Importance type: gain, split, or permutation
schema.title: Type
Response Get Importance Artifacts  Artifact Id  Importance Get

get.description: List all tags on an artifact.

schema.title: Response List Tags Artifacts  Artifact Id  Tags Get

post.description: Add a tag to an artifact (idempotent).

schema.title: Response Add Tag Artifacts  Artifact Id  Tags Post

delete.description: Remove a tag from an artifact.

get.description: Liveness probe — does not check storage or downstream deps.

schema.title: Response List Versions Models  Model Id  Versions Get
